runs.result: {"a":[{"intent":"add wide-angle lens options to wishlist","risk":"l","action":{"k":"callWebSkill","href":"https://uat.fotopia.com.hk/skills/fotopiastore/SKILL.md","fnName":"window._web_skills.fotopiaStore.addWishlist","arg":"{\"items\":[{\"stockId\":\"fd9504ce-9708-464a-94b6-e3ea8cea58e8\",\"comment\":\"Recommended for a compact, classic Leica wide-angle setup; in-stock, no ASPH, and a strong everyday 28mm choice.\"},{\"stockId\":\"b34b4287-a6fd-40ca-9e65-8f5e5acbc262\",\"comment\":\"Best if you want a premium limited-edition 28mm with modern build quality, no ASPH, and strong collectible value.\"},{\"stockId\":\"a58c2fc9-c347-494f-b335-5b8b100a0f96\",\"comment\":\"Good alternative 28mm option with a classic rendering style and no ASPH, suitable if you want a more modern brass build.\"}],\"navigateToWishlist\":true}"},"cp":[3]}],"next":{"tip":"After the wishlist updates, verify the lens items appear, then ask which camera/lens to buy and prepare checkout.","descAttachment":[{"name":"lens-options","desc":"Selected wide-angle lens wishlist candidates: Leica Summaron-M 28mm F5.6 Silver, Leica Summaron-M 28mm F5.6 Black, Light Lens Lab 28mm F2.8 9 Elements Chrome."}]}}
